gist.headline: Terminal velocity in the greenhouse
gist.blurb: OMNI has been added to the community greenhouse. It's a CLI tool, because sometimes you just want to type things into a void and get magic back.
gist.summary: Added the OMNI command-line interface to the community apps showcase and greenhouse directory.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and explore the OMNI CLI tool directly from the Pollinations app directory.
gist.visual_concept: OMNI is a CLI tool, and it was added to the 'GREENHOUSE'. Visual metaphor: a retro computer terminal sprouting like a plant in a cozy digital greenhouse. Polly the bee acting as a gardener.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gardener's straw hat, watering a glowing retro computer terminal that is sprouting like a plant from a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot inside a digital greenhouse. Soft pastel lavender and mint gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
